title: Playground Admin Workbench
concept: A dense WordPress-admin-like dashboard for theme authors who repeatedly create, save, inspect, and export Playgrounds. The first viewport is a compact register table with progressive disclosure sections for creation, storage, Site Manager, and Blueprint gallery work.
focus: compact tables and filters for repeated use
flows: connect GitHub and import plugin, theme, or wp-content repositories
save temporary Playgrounds to browser storage or a local directory
navigate the active WordPress site by path
edit site settings and apply reset or reload
view, copy, download, and run blueprint bundles
inspect database state and open database tools
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs
export to GitHub and download as zip
browse, search, and filter the Blueprint gallery
featureCoverage: all 43 Blueprint gallery with category filters
destructive reset and stored reload behavior
new file and new folder actions
file upload and browse files actions
database driver, path, and size inspection
